sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108078" key="u(/pnon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὕπνον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n108078.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lichen,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg001:75" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.75</biblScope></bibl>, and cited by Cornarius <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Comm.ad Gal.Pharm.sec.locos,</tr_> Basil.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1537</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.290</biblScope></bibl>, from <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg012:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.44</biblScope> </bibl> ( <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">55</biblScope> </bibl> Kostomiris), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg013:117" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.117</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">118</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
